en: Can I check in here Sure Can I see your passport
ko: 여기서 체크인할 수 있나요? 네. 여권 좀 볼 수 있을까요?

en: Thank you Where are you flying to today Edinburgh
Scotland for a long weekend Lovely Here's your boarding pass You've got seat A and
ko: 스코틀랜드, 짧은 주말여행이요. 좋네요. 여기 탑승권이요. 25열 A석이고

en: row 25 right by the window Are you checking in any luggage
ko: 창가 바로 옆이에요. 부칠 짐이 있으세요?

en: Just this suitcase Please put it on the scale
ko: 이 캐리어 하나요. 저울 위에 올려주세요

en: Oh it's overweight I'm afraid you're going to have to pay Oh how much
ko: 아 무게 초과네요. 추가 요금을 내셔야 해요. 어머 얼마요?

en: £100 What But my flight was only £30 Sorry
Thank you Have a safe flight
